description: Begging your pardon, sirs. Edgelord said the Izzet node already flagged Ral as a sub-node candidate at two depicted prints plus the attribution cycle, so I went ahead and made the node, if that's all right? It's modeled on the Jace-Beleren stub-character template — corpus aspects (WAR-arc lazotep-melting-point + MH3-Saga maze-run retrospective), the Ral's <Spell> attribution cycle as canonical pattern, sub-node-under-parent-faction relation parallel to Acerola under Alola Trial Captains, and the queer-canonical Tomik footnote because if we ever surface Ral in bundle copy that detail is part of the character's full Wizards-canon register. Both cards now carry characters: ['ral-zarek', 'izzet-league'] — the operative-and-institution relation is encoded on both ends.
other_candidates_considered: Niv-Mizzet — deferred per izzet-league caveat; no depicted corpus prints yet, sub-node case becomes immediate when a Niv-Mizzet printing enters the corpus.
